items.title: Armed man shot and killed after ‘unauthorized entry’ into Mar-a-Lago: Secret Service
items.description: A man was fatally shot after allegedly making an "unauthorized entry" at Mar-a-Lago while carrying what appeared to be a shotgun and fuel can.
